name: example-project
description: Example project-specific denylist preset. Demonstrates the shape of a real-world preset: workflow-specific PII-bearing files, anonymization artifacts, and per-file precision for confirmed-sensitive paths. Patterns are case-insensitive. Replace with your own.
notes: The last two entries demonstrate the **per-file precision principle**: when only specific files in a directory are confirmed-sensitive, list them individually rather than blocking the whole directory (other files in the same directory may be benign — e.g. a generic prompt template — and blocking the directory would prevent the peer reviewer from reading them). Anchor patterns to a unique path fragment (`/Example Submissions/...`) to avoid accidental matches elsewhere in the workspace.
